title: nasturtium lanatum
intro: Nasturtium lanatum, also known as Shepherd's Cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. Nasturtium lanatum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
